items.title: API scaffolding + slug generation
items.desc: Stand up the HTTP server, define the routes, implement base62 ID generation, wire collision-check for custom slugs. Auth modes (open / api-key / OAuth) gated behind config.

items.title: Hot-path redirect
items.desc: GET /:slug → cache lookup → DB fallback → 302. The most-trafficked code path in the service; budget < 5 ms server-side on a cache hit.

items.title: Dashboard + create-link UI
items.desc: Tiny embedded HTML/JS dashboard: list links, create, see per-slug stats. Served from go:embed, no separate web server. Tailwind-flavored CSS in one stylesheet.

items.title: Analytics ingestion + nightly rollup
items.desc: Handler emits click event → buffered queue → worker writes to events table. Nightly cron rolls events into per-slug daily aggregates the dashboard reads.

items.title: Deploy guide + handover
items.desc: One-page deploy script per target (systemd / docker / k8s). Worked example: from `wget` to first redirect in under 5 minutes. Backup + restore documented.

items.title: Ship sequence — order to ship the 5 builds in
items.desc: BUILD-1..5 are roughly equal in size; the order changes what the user sees first and how usable each intermediate cut is.

options.name: Vertical slice — create+redirect end-to-end first
options.desc: BUILD-1 (API scaffold) → BUILD-2 (redirect) → BUILD-3 (minimal UI) → BUILD-4 (analytics) → BUILD-5 (deploy). Every intermediate state has at least the core feature working.
options.recommendation: Matches the team-of-3-to-50 audience (OVR-2 default): they want to deploy SOMETHING by end of week one and add analytics next sprint. Vertical means the hot path (BUILD-2) is real by step 2, not step 4. Backend-first defers the first useful demo until ~half-done.

options.name: Backend-first — API + redirect + analytics, then UI, then deploy
options.desc: BUILD-1 → BUILD-2 → BUILD-4 → BUILD-3 → BUILD-5. Best when the consumer is another service first, the dashboard second.

options.name: Infra-first — deploy story before features
options.desc: BUILD-5 (deploy with a stub) → BUILD-1 → BUILD-2 → BUILD-3 → BUILD-4. CI/CD pipeline working before any user-facing feature. Heavy upfront tax for solo devs.
